mapper.select: SELECT 'listening' AS module, 'question' AS object_type, lq.id AS id, lq.test_id AS test_id, lq.id AS question_id, lt.title AS title, lt.title AS test_title, lq.question_text AS question_text, lq.correct_answer AS correct_answer, lq.question_number AS question_number, lq.question_type AS question_type, lq.answer_mode AS answer_mode, lq.options_json AS options_json, lq.accepted_answers_json AS accepted_answers_json, lt.transcript_text AS transcript_text, lt.audio_url AS audio_url, lt.audio_object_key AS audio_object_key FROM listening_question lq INNER JOIN listening_test lt ON lt.id = lq.test_id AND lt.is_deleted = 0 WHERE lq.id = #{questionId} AND lq.is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1

SELECT 'reading' AS module, 'question' AS object_type, rq.id AS id, rp.test_id AS test_id, rp.id AS passage_id, rq.id AS question_id, rp.title AS title, rt.title AS test_title, rp.title AS passage_title, rp.content AS passage_content, rq.question_text AS question_text, rq.correct_answer AS correct_answer, rq.display_order AS question_number, rq.question_type AS question_type, rq.answer_mode AS answer_mode, rq.options_json AS options_json, rq.accepted_answers_json AS accepted_answers_json FROM reading_question rq INNER JOIN reading_passage rp ON rp.id = rq.passage_id AND rp.is_deleted = 0 INNER JOIN reading_test rt ON rt.id = rp.test_id AND rt.is_deleted = 0 WHERE rq.id = #{questionId} AND rq.is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1

SELECT 'speaking' AS module, 'question' AS object_type, sq.id AS id, sq.id AS question_id, sq.topic_key AS title, sq.question_text AS question_text, sq.sub_type AS question_type, sq.display_order AS question_number, sq.cue_card AS cue_card FROM speaking_question sq WHERE sq.id = #{questionId} AND sq.is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1

SELECT 'writing' AS module, 'question' AS object_type, wq.id AS id, wq.id AS question_id, wq.title AS title, wq.description AS question_text, wq.image_url AS image_url, wq.task_type AS task_type FROM writing_question wq WHERE wq.id = #{questionId} AND wq.is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1

SELECT 'reading' AS module, 'passage' AS object_type, rp.id AS id, rp.test_id AS test_id, rp.id AS passage_id, rp.title AS title, rt.title AS test_title, rp.title AS passage_title, rp.content AS content, rp.content AS passage_content FROM reading_passage rp INNER JOIN reading_test rt ON rt.id = rp.test_id AND rt.is_deleted = 0 WHERE rp.id = #{passageId} AND rp.is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1

SELECT 'listening' AS module, 'test' AS object_type, lt.id AS id, lt.id AS test_id, lt.title AS title, lt.title AS test_title, lt.transcript_text AS transcript_text, lt.audio_url AS audio_url, lt.audio_object_key AS audio_object_key FROM listening_test lt WHERE lt.id = #{testId} AND lt.is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT 'reading' AS module, 'test' AS object_type, rt.id AS id, rt.id AS test_id, rt.title AS title, rt.title AS test_title FROM reading_test rt WHERE rt.id = #{testId} AND rt.is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1

SELECT 'listening' AS module, lr.user_id AS user_id, lr.id AS record_id, lr.test_id AS test_id, lq.id AS question_id, lar.user_answer AS user_answer, lar.is_correct AS correct, lar.score AS score, lr.total_score AS total_score, DATE_FORMAT(lr.created_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS created_time FROM listening_record lr INNER JOIN listening_question lq ON lq.test_id = lr.test_id AND lq.id = #{questionId} AND lq.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN listening_answer_record lar ON lar.record_id = lr.id AND lar.question_id = lq.id WHERE lr.user_id = #{userId} AND lr.id = #{recordId} AND lr.is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1

SELECT 'reading' AS module, rr.user_id AS user_id, rr.id AS record_id, rr.test_id AS test_id, rp.id AS passage_id, rq.id AS question_id, rar.user_answer AS user_answer, rar.is_correct AS correct, rar.score AS score, rr.total_score AS total_score, DATE_FORMAT(rr.created_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS created_time FROM reading_record rr INNER JOIN reading_test rt ON rt.id = rr.test_id AND rt.is_deleted = 0 INNER JOIN reading_passage rp ON rp.test_id = rt.id AND rp.is_deleted = 0 INNER JOIN reading_question rq ON rq.passage_id = rp.id AND rq.id = #{questionId} AND rq.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN reading_answer_record rar ON rar.record_id = rr.id AND rar.question_id = rq.id WHERE rr.user_id = #{userId} AND rr.id = #{recordId} AND rr.is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1

SELECT 'speaking' AS module, sr.user_id AS user_id, sr.id AS record_id, sr.session_id AS session_id, sr.question_id AS question_id, sr.transcript AS user_answer, sr.transcript AS transcript, sr.audio_url AS audio_url, sr.feedback AS feedback, sr.feedback AS ai_feedback, sr.overall_score AS ai_score, sr.answer_status AS answer_status, sr.ai_status AS ai_status, DATE_FORMAT(sr.created_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS created_time FROM speaking_record sr WHERE sr.user_id = #{userId} AND sr.id = #{recordId} AND sr.question_id = #{questionId} AND sr.is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1

SELECT 'writing' AS module, wr.user_id AS user_id, wr.id AS record_id, wr.question_id AS question_id, COALESCE(wr.text_content, wr.extracted_text) AS user_answer, wr.text_content AS text_content, wr.extracted_text AS extracted_text, wr.ai_feedback AS ai_feedback, wr.ai_score AS ai_score, wr.ai_status AS ai_status, DATE_FORMAT(wr.created_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS created_time FROM writing_record wr WHERE wr.user_id = #{userId} AND wr.id = #{recordId} AND wr.question_id = #{questionId} AND wr.is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1

SELECT lq.id AS questionId, lq.test_id AS testId, lq.section_number AS sectionNumber, lq.question_number AS questionNumber, lq.question_text AS questionText, lq.correct_answer AS correctAnswer, lq.question_type AS questionType, lq.answer_mode AS answerMode, lq.options_json AS optionsJson, lq.accepted_answers_json AS acceptedAnswersJson, lar.user_answer AS userAnswer, lar.is_correct AS isCorrect, lar.score AS userScore FROM listening_record lr INNER JOIN listening_question lq ON lq.test_id = lr.test_id AND lq.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN listening_answer_record lar ON lar.record_id = lr.id AND lar.question_id = lq.id WHERE lr.user_id = #{userId} AND lr.id = #{recordId} AND lr.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY lq.question_number ASC, lq.display_order ASC

SELECT rq.id AS questionId, rp.id AS passageId, rp.test_id AS testId, rp.title AS passageTitle, rq.display_order AS questionNumber, rq.question_text AS questionText, rq.correct_answer AS correctAnswer, rq.question_type AS questionType, rq.answer_mode AS answerMode, rq.options_json AS optionsJson, rq.accepted_answers_json AS acceptedAnswersJson, rar.user_answer AS userAnswer, rar.is_correct AS isCorrect, rar.score AS userScore FROM reading_record rr INNER JOIN reading_passage rp ON rp.test_id = rr.test_id AND rp.is_deleted = 0 INNER JOIN reading_question rq ON rq.passage_id = rp.id AND rq.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN reading_answer_record rar ON rar.record_id = rr.id AND rar.question_id = rq.id WHERE rr.user_id = #{userId} AND rr.id = #{recordId} AND rr.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY rp.id ASC, rq.display_order ASC

SELECT lq.id AS questionId, lq.test_id AS testId FROM listening_record lr INNER JOIN listening_question lq ON lq.test_id = lr.test_id AND lq.is_deleted = 0 WHERE lr.id = #{recordId} AND lr.user_id = #{userId} AND lr.is_deleted = 0 AND lq.question_number = #{questionNumber} LIMIT 1

SELECT rq.id AS questionId, rp.id AS passageId, rp.test_id AS testId FROM reading_record rr INNER JOIN reading_passage rp ON rp.test_id = rr.test_id AND rp.is_deleted = 0 INNER JOIN reading_question rq ON rq.passage_id = rp.id AND rq.is_deleted = 0 WHERE rr.id = #{recordId} AND rr.user_id = #{userId} AND rr.is_deleted = 0 AND rq.display_order = #{questionNumber} LIMIT 1

SELECT 'listening' AS module,
'listening' AS test_module, 'test' AS test_object_type, lt.id AS test_id, lt.id AS test_test_id, lt.title AS test_title, lt.audio_url AS test_audio_url, lt.audio_object_key AS test_audio_object_key, lt.transcript_text AS test_transcript_text,
'listening' AS question_module, 'question' AS question_object_type, lq.id AS question_id, lq.test_id AS question_test_id, lq.id AS question_question_id, lt.title AS question_test_title, lq.question_text AS question_question_text, lq.correct_answer AS question_correct_answer, lq.question_number AS question_question_number, lq.question_type AS question_question_type, lq.answer_mode AS question_answer_mode, lq.options_json AS question_options_json, lq.accepted_answers_json AS question_accepted_answers_json, lt.transcript_text AS question_transcript_text, lt.audio_url AS question_audio_url, lt.audio_object_key AS question_audio_object_key,
'listening' AS attempt_module, lr.user_id AS attempt_user_id, lr.id AS attempt_record_id, lr.test_id AS attempt_test_id, lq.id AS attempt_question_id, lar.user_answer AS attempt_user_answer, lar.is_correct AS attempt_correct, lar.score AS attempt_score, lr.total_score AS attempt_total_score, DATE_FORMAT(lr.created_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS attempt_created_time FROM listening_record lr INNER JOIN listening_test lt ON lt.id = lr.test_id AND lt.is_deleted = 0 INNER JOIN listening_question lq ON lq.test_id = lt.id AND lq.id = #{questionId} AND lq.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN listening_answer_record lar ON lar.record_id = lr.id AND lar.question_id = lq.id WHERE lr.id = #{recordId} AND lr.user_id = #{userId} AND lr.is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1

SELECT 'reading' AS module,
'reading' AS test_module, 'test' AS test_object_type, rt.id AS test_id, rt.id AS test_test_id, rt.title AS test_title,
'reading' AS passage_module, 'passage' AS passage_object_type, rp.id AS passage_id, rp.test_id AS passage_test_id, rp.id AS passage_passage_id, rp.title AS passage_title, rp.content AS passage_content, rt.title AS passage_test_title,
'reading' AS question_module, 'question' AS question_object_type, rq.id AS question_id, rp.test_id AS question_test_id, rp.id AS question_passage_id, rq.id AS question_question_id, rt.title AS question_test_title, rp.title AS question_passage_title, rp.content AS question_passage_content, rq.question_text AS question_question_text, rq.correct_answer AS question_correct_answer, rq.display_order AS question_question_number, rq.question_type AS question_question_type, rq.answer_mode AS question_answer_mode, rq.options_json AS question_options_json, rq.accepted_answers_json AS question_accepted_answers_json,
'reading' AS attempt_module, rr.user_id AS attempt_user_id, rr.id AS attempt_record_id, rr.test_id AS attempt_test_id, rp.id AS attempt_passage_id, rq.id AS attempt_question_id, rar.user_answer AS attempt_user_answer, rar.is_correct AS attempt_correct, rar.score AS attempt_score, rr.total_score AS attempt_total_score, DATE_FORMAT(rr.created_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS attempt_created_time FROM reading_record rr INNER JOIN reading_test rt ON rt.id = rr.test_id AND rt.is_deleted = 0 INNER JOIN reading_passage rp ON rp.test_id = rt.id AND rp.is_deleted = 0 INNER JOIN reading_question rq ON rq.passage_id = rp.id AND rq.id = #{questionId} AND rq.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN reading_answer_record rar ON rar.record_id = rr.id AND rar.question_id = rq.id WHERE rr.id = #{recordId} AND rr.user_id = #{userId} AND rr.is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1

SELECT 'writing' AS module,
'writing' AS question_module, 'question' AS question_object_type, wq.id AS question_id, wq.id AS question_question_id, wq.task_type AS question_task_type, wq.title AS question_title, wq.description AS question_question_text, wq.image_url AS question_image_url,
'writing' AS attempt_module, wr.user_id AS attempt_user_id, wr.id AS attempt_record_id, wr.question_id AS attempt_question_id, wr.text_content AS attempt_text_content, wr.extracted_text AS attempt_extracted_text, COALESCE(wr.text_content, wr.extracted_text) AS attempt_user_answer, wr.ai_feedback AS attempt_ai_feedback, wr.ai_score AS attempt_ai_score, wr.ai_status AS attempt_ai_status, DATE_FORMAT(wr.created_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS attempt_created_time FROM writing_record wr INNER JOIN writing_question wq ON wq.id = wr.question_id AND wq.is_deleted = 0 WHERE wr.id = #{recordId} AND wr.user_id = #{userId} AND wr.is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1

SELECT 'speaking' AS module,
'speaking' AS question_module, 'question' AS question_object_type, sq.id AS question_id, sq.id AS question_question_id, sq.sub_type AS question_question_type, sq.topic_key AS question_title, sq.question_text AS question_question_text, sq.cue_card AS question_cue_card, sq.display_order AS question_question_number,
'speaking' AS attempt_module, sr.user_id AS attempt_user_id, sr.id AS attempt_record_id, sr.session_id AS attempt_session_id, sr.question_id AS attempt_question_id, sr.audio_url AS attempt_audio_url, sr.transcript AS attempt_transcript, sr.transcript AS attempt_user_answer, sr.feedback AS attempt_feedback, sr.feedback AS attempt_ai_feedback, sr.overall_score AS attempt_ai_score, sr.answer_status AS attempt_answer_status, sr.ai_status AS attempt_ai_status, DATE_FORMAT(sr.created_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS attempt_created_time FROM speaking_record sr INNER JOIN speaking_question sq ON sq.id = sr.question_id AND sq.is_deleted = 0 WHERE sr.id = #{recordId} AND sr.user_id = #{userId} AND sr.is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
